ElevenAgents by ElevenLabs [...] 👋 Hey Product Hunt!  
We built Kodey.ai to make deploying and managing AI agents as simple as spinning up a website.  
  
💡 What it is  
  
Kodey is an AI workforce platform that lets you create, deploy, and scale agentic AI teams — all in one place.  
  
Build AI agents that can take real actions across your business (send emails, manage data, handle ops)  
  
Connect instantly to tools like Gmail, Stripe, Notion, Supabase, and APIs  
  
Launch agents anywhere — inside your app, website, or dashboard  
  
No complex setup, no prompt spaghetti 🍝 — just agents that actually do the work.  
  
🎯 Who it’s for  
  
Founders & operators who want to automate tasks beyond ChatGPT-style chat  
  
Dev shops & agencies that want to resell or white-label AI agents for clients (launching soon!)

•1 review [...] Review Sider: AI Research Agent & Extension?

Reviewers mostly see Sider as a practical browser-side AI helper that saves time: they praise its easy web integration, broad feature set, source scanning, clear summaries, and everyday usefulness for tasks like drafting emails, checking grammar, simplifying technical text, and generating ideas. Several also highlight frequent updates and responsive support. The main criticism is around cost and usage limits, with one especially negative review calling “unlimited” access misleading and refund handling frustrating. Overall, sentiment is strongly positive, though expectations around access and pricing need clearer handling.
